title: F34
description: Press F3 and F4 on your keyboard to switch game modes!
body:
Switch between game modes by pressing F3 and F4 on your keyboard!
In previous versions, /gamemode 1 could be too difficult or time-consuming.
But with this mode, you can quickly and easily switch between modes by pressing F3 and F4 on your keyboard.


Official Link:[https://mlerjator-sudo.github.io/](https://mlerjator-sudo.github.io/)

I’ve only updated to 1.12.2 so far, but I’m working on the latest version. People are talking about versions 1.21.11 and 26, but I think they’ll feel that way. They might ask, “Why bother? The latest version already has a game mode switcher.” However, I believe the latest version is highly efficient because it allows players to freely customize it and includes features not found in the vanilla version.
